name: campaign_performance_snapshot
description: Initial weekly review extract. Intentionally includes duplicate and malformed rows so candidates must inspect before using it.

columns.name: report_date
columns.description: Reporting date for the daily campaign rollup

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Audience segment label from the marketing export

columns.name: signups
columns.description: Daily signups attributed to the segment

columns.name: conversions
columns.description: Daily conversions attributed to the segment
